prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 13300→14722→15507→20060→20981，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 6200 名，2025 年基准约 20981 名；2021–2025 年物理类计划数分别为 34→45→49→36→45，波动较大；2026 年计划 45 人，与 2025 年持平，计划无扩缩，对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 福州大学为 211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年第 77 名，近年排名稳定在 72–81 区间，属中上水平 211；2024 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），2025–2026 年声誉文件无福州大学记录；抖音热度排名第 88（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；化学为 A- 学科，与该校化学、化学工程与工艺等招生专业对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，福 州大学物理类招生含上述热门专业，可能推高报考热度；湖南省 2026 年物理类考生约 34.7 万人，较 2025 年 32.0 万人增加约 8.3%，竞争明显加剧；省控线 2025 年物理类本科批 405 分，较 2024 年 422 分下降，反映整体难度或考生结构变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划持平、物理类考生大幅增加约 8.3% 以及热门专业对报考的拉动作用，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年进一步加剧。预测最低位次约 21281 名，区间 20781–21781 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13300 → 14722 → 15507 → 20060 → 20981, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6200 places in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 20981; the enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 34 → 45 → 49 → 36 → 45, with significant fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 45, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with no records of Fuzhou University in the 2025–2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 88th (average), with moderate short video exposure, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; Chemistry is an A- discipline, corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Chemistry and Chemical Engineering and Technology, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended in society. Fuzhou University's Physics Category enrollment includes these popular majors, which may increase application enthusiasm; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.3% compared to 320,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, reflecting changes in overall difficulty or examinee structure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 plan, the significant increase of about 8.3% in Physics Category examinees, and the driving effect of popular majors on applications, competition in 2026 is expected to further intensify compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 21281, with a range of 20781–21781.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20781–21781, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information) as ambitious choices, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. Chemistry (A-), despite its outstanding discipline evaluation, has relatively low social popularity, making it suitable for examinees with a clear interest in chemistry.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated narrowly within the 3200–3800 range: approximately 3188 → 3642 → 3681 → 3781 → 3614, with a 2025 baseline of about 3614. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 7 → 6 → 7 → 7 → 8, and the 2026 plan is 8, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, with some appeal to liberal arts applicants. In 2024, its reputation was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but no new records emerged in 2025–2026. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 88th (average), with no significant surge in application interest. Its A- rated discipline, Chemistry, has weak relevance to History Category majors (Accounting, Sociology), offering limited support for liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Regional Factors
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting/Financial Management are socially recommended as hot majors, while Sociology/Chinese Language and Literature show divided interest and are watched. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 143,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 31.2% in History Category examinees, and the relatively high popularity of Accounting, competition is expected to intensify noticeably in 2026, with rankings slightly declining compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3764, with a range of 3264–4264.
